hook: You can help chemistry grow by choosing formats that create interaction instead of just observation.
body: Experiences that involve movement, teamwork, or playful challenge often make attraction easier to feel and test.

hook: Many first dates make chemistry harder to find because the setup is too static, formal, or interview-like.
body: Pick formats that let personality show up in motion. Experiences that involve movement, teamwork, or playful challenge often make attraction easier to feel and test.

hook: Pick formats that let personality show up in motion.
body: Mini golf, cooking, or a walk with stops can create more natural charge than sitting face-to-face under pressure for two hours.
